backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend that defines UserProfile and PurchaseOrder types, manages user profiles in a map, and enforces access control via mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature fix for form reset logic across all form modals, ensuring modal mount/reset only clears local React state without affecting the Zustand store or backend data.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of pages, components, and the app store.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Petrol Pump Management Software app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, sales, inventory, staff, customers, billing, reports, suppliers, expenses, other, login, profile-setup) and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/billing/InvoiceD: Modal component that displays full invoice details including line items, subtotal, tax, and total formatted in INR, with actions to mark an invoice as paid or toggle its status.
frontend/src/components/customers/Redeem: Modal that allows redeeming a specified number of loyalty points for a given customer, with validation to prevent redeeming more points than available.
frontend/src/components/customers/Regist: Modal for registering new customers or editing existing ones, with form fields for name, phone, email, and vehicle info, pre-populated in edit mode and blank in add mode.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Metric: A reusable dashboard card component that displays a metric with title, value, unit, icon, optional trend badge, and color-coded status styling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StockG: A fuel stock gauge card that visualizes current tank level as a progress bar with threshold marker, showing OK/Low/Critical status for a given fuel type.
frontend/src/components/inventory/StockA: A modal dialog for adding or removing fuel stock quantities, allowing selection of fuel type, direction, amount, and reason before calling the store's adjustStock action.
frontend/src/components/inventory/Thresh: A modal dialog for configuring low-stock alert thresholds per fuel type, reading current values from the store and saving updates via updateThreshold.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: The root application layout component that composes the Sidebar, TopBar, and a main content area rendered via TanStack Router's Outlet, with mobile sidebar toggle state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: A responsive navigation sidebar with a list of app routes, active-route highlighting, mobile backdrop overlay, and a close button for small screens.
frontend/src/components/layout/TopBar.ts: A top header bar showing the app name, a hamburger menu button for mobile, and a notification bell icon with a badge count of low-stock inventory items.
frontend/src/components/sales/RecordSale: A modal form for recording a new fuel sale, with fields for fuel type, litres, price, payment method, pump number, staff, and optional customer, including stock validation and store dispatch.
frontend/src/components/staff/ShiftFormM: A modal dialog form for scheduling a new staff shift, collecting fields like staff member, date, time range, pump number, and status, with basic validation before dispatching to the app store.
frontend/src/components/staff/StaffFormM: A modal dialog form for adding or editing a staff member, handling fields like name, role, contact info, hire date, salary, and pay period, and dispatching add/update actions to the app store.
frontend/src/components/suppliers/Purcha: A modal dialog form for creating a purchase order, allowing selection of supplier, fuel type, quantity, price, and dates, with auto-calculated total amount before saving to the app store.
frontend/src/components/suppliers/Suppli: A modal dialog form for adding or editing a supplier, capturing name, contact, email, address, supported fuel types via checkboxes, and rating, then dispatching to the app store.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useGetCallerUserProfile hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend actor using React Query, waiting until the actor is ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Rajdhani fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark navy + amber industrial theme using OKLCH CSS custom properties with utility classes for colors, gauges, scrollbars, and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Billing.tsx: Billing page that displays invoice summary cards (paid, pending, overdue totals), a searchable invoice table, and opens an InvoiceDetailModal when a row is selected.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single customer showing contact info, vehicle details, loyalty points, and aggregated purchase statistics derived from filtered fuel sales records.
frontend/src/pages/Customers.tsx: Customers list page with search, summary stat cards, a data table with edit/delete actions, and modals for registering new customers and redeeming loyalty points.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing a banner image, metric cards for revenue, expenses, net profit, and customer count, plus low-stock alerts and a recent sales list.
frontend/src/pages/Expenses.tsx: Expenses page that lists recorded expenses with search and category filtering, displays category totals, and provides a dialog form to add new expense entries.
frontend/src/pages/FuelSales.tsx: Displays a fuel sales management page with summary cards (revenue, litres sold, unique customers), filterable/searchable sales table, and a modal to record new sales.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Shows fuel inventory levels with stock progress indicators, low-stock alerts, and dialogs to add stock or update fuel prices.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting authenticated users to profile setup or the dashboard based on their profile status.
frontend/src/pages/Other.tsx: Static page displaying cards for miscellaneous sections (Settings, Notifications, Security, Help, About) with brief descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form that collects a new user's name, role, and contact info, then saves the profile to the backend actor and navigates to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Analytics page with Recharts-powered charts showing daily fuel sales summaries, 30-day revenue/volume trends, fuel-type breakdowns, and expense-vs-revenue comparisons over a selectable date range.
frontend/src/pages/StaffManagement.tsx: React page for managing staff members and shift schedules, featuring search, add/edit/delete staff via modals, shift creation, and a payroll summary displayed in INR.
frontend/src/pages/Suppliers.tsx: React page for managing fuel suppliers and purchase orders, with tabbed views for a supplier directory and order list, supporting add/edit/delete suppliers and order status updates.
frontend/src/store/appStore.ts: Zustand store with persisted state defining all core data types (FuelInventory, FuelSale, Customer, Supplier, Staff, etc.) and CRUD actions for the entire application.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Shared TypeScript type definitions for the frontend, covering fuel sales, inventory, staff, customers, billing, suppliers, expenses, and reporting structures.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Rajdhani), oklch-based color tokens (navy, amber, fuel types, sidebar, chart, etc.), dark mode support, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for the Petrol Pump Manager app, recording a known bug where form reset logic on page load incorrectly clears saved database records instead of only resetting local React form fields.
